decision: Use sync psycopg2 engine for M1 diagnostic (read-only). Host: jip-data-engine.ctay2iewomaj.ap-south-1.rds.amazonaws.com, DB: data_engine, User: jip_admin, Region: ap-south-1, SSL: verify-full with AWS RDS CA bundle. Password from JIP_DB_PASSWORD env var at runtime.
All de_* tables live in public schema. PRD candidates (data_engine, fie_v3, jip) do not exist as schemas. intelligence schema created for new platform tables.
No NIFTY MICROCAP 250 index in data. Stock universe = NIFTY 500 (500) + top 250 by 60-day median traded value. Per PRD Section 8.6 fallback.
de_mf_master lacks plan/option columns. Adapted: filter by fund_name pattern (contains Gr/Growth, excludes Direct/IDCW). Yields 654 schemes vs PRD est. of 400.
de_global_prices contains Indian ETF prices (GOLDBEES, NIFTYBEES, etc), NOT international benchmarks. S&P 500 and MSCI World are MISSING — need yfinance ingest in M2.

detail: Tier 1/2/4 100% pass. Tier 3 98.33% with 2 NUMERIC(18,4) precision artifacts (Flat vs Deteriorating at boundary) accepted for M2 sign-off. Three validation methodology bugs fixed (sampler bar_seq filter, EMA lookback bound, rolling max_drawdown formula). _log_run() schema mismatch fixed. JIP data quality issues (IDFCFIRSTB close=10010) documented. Next: 3 consecutive nightly runs (Tier 5) starting 2026-05-08.

decision: ema_10_ratio / ema_20_ratio precision deferred to M3
detail: Stored as NUMERIC(18,4). Two stocks had ratios differing only at 5th decimal during compute, producing correct 'Deteriorating' classification. On readback both ratios round to same 4-decimal value, so hand validator sees 'Flat'. Fix: migrate to NUMERIC(18,8) at M3 threshold calibration review.

sql_preview: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name LIKE 'atlas_%' ORDER BY table_name;

SELECT table_schema, table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('pg_catalog','information_schema','pg_toast','realtime','supabase_functions','storage','auth','net','vault','extensions','pgsodium','pgsodium_masks','graphql','graphql_public','_realtime','pgbouncer','cron') ORDER BY table_schema, table_name LIMIT 30;

SELECT version_num FROM atlas.atlas_alembic_version;
SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='atlas' AND table_name IN ('atlas_cell_definitions','atlas_cell_rule_candidates','atlas_conviction_daily','atlas_signal_calls','atlas_scorecard_daily','atlas_regime_daily','atlas_thresholds') ORDER BY table_name;
SELECT version_num FROM atlas.atlas_alembic_version LIMIT 5;
SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='atlas' AND table_name ~ '(cell|conviction|scorecard|signal_call|walkforward|regime)' ORDER BY table_name;

SELECT n.nspname AS schema, COUNT(*) AS table_count 
FROM information_schema.tables t 
JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.nspname = t.table_schema 
WHERE t.table_schema NOT IN ('pg_catalog','information_schema','pg_toast','realtime','supabase_functions','storage','auth','net','vault','extensions','pgsodium','pgsodium_masks','graphql','graphql_public','_realtime','pgbouncer','cron') 
GROUP BY n.nspname ORDER BY table_count DESC;

SELECT table_schema, COUNT(*) AS table_count 
FROM information_schema.tables 
WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('pg_catalog','information_schema','pg_toast','realtime','supabase_functions','storage','auth','net','vault','extensions','pgsodium','pgsodium_masks','graphql','graphql_public','_realtime','pgbouncer','cron') 
GROUP BY table_schema ORDER BY table_count DESC;

SELECT n.nspname AS schema, t.typname AS enum_name 
FROM pg_type t 
JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = t.typnamespace 
WHERE t.typtype = 'e' 
AND t.typname IN ('atlas_cap_tier','atlas_family_state','atlas_cell_action','atlas_tenure','atlas_regime_state','atlas_drift_status','atlas_exit_reason') 
ORDER BY t.typname;

SELECT tenure, verdict, COUNT(*) AS n
FROM atlas.atlas_conviction_daily
WHERE snapshot_date = '2026-05-22'
GROUP BY tenure, verdict
ORDER BY tenure, verdict;

SELECT
  instrument_id,
  cap_tier,
  rs_residual_6m,
  realized_vol_60d,
  log_med_tv_60d,
  jsonb_object_keys(features) AS feature_keys
FROM atlas.atlas_scorecard_daily
WHERE date = '2026-05-22'
LIMIT 10;

SELECT cap_tier, COUNT(*) AS n,
  AVG(CASE WHEN features = '{}'::jsonb THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pct_empty_features,
  MAX(jsonb_typeof(features)) AS feature_type,
  (SELECT jsonb_object_keys(features) FROM atlas.atlas_scorecard_daily WHERE date = '2026-05-22' AND features <> '{}'::jsonb LIMIT 1) AS sample_key
FROM atlas.atlas_scorecard_daily
WHERE date = '2026-05-22'
GROUP BY cap_tier;

SELECT jsonb_pretty(features) FROM atlas.atlas_scorecard_daily 
WHERE date='2026-05-22' AND features <> '{}'::jsonb LIMIT 1;
SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name='de_equity_ohlcv' ORDER BY ordinal_position;

-- Phase 1.2: distribution of max(date) per instrument — alive vs delisted
WITH last_trade AS (
  SELECT instrument_id, MAX(date) AS last_date
  FROM public.de_equity_ohlcv
  WHERE date >= '2014-01-01'
  GROUP BY instrument_id
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE last_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days') AS alive_30d,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE last_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days' AND last_date < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days') AS borderline_30_90d,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE last_

-- Phase 1.3: borderline 30-90 day instruments — inspect
WITH last_trade AS (
  SELECT instrument_id, MAX(date) AS last_date, MIN(date) AS first_date, COUNT(*) AS row_count
  FROM public.de_equity_ohlcv
  WHERE date >= '2014-01-01'
  GROUP BY instrument_id
)

FROM last_trade
WHERE last_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '365 days' AND last_date < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30

  WHERE date >= '2014-01-01'
  GROUP BY instrument_id
)

       ds.symbol_sample
FROM last_trade lt
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT symbol AS symbol_sample

SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='public' AND table_name='de_instrument' ORDER BY ordinal_position;

-- de_instrument coverage vs OHLCV
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_active = true) AS is_active_true,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_tradeable = true) AS is_tradeable_true,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_suspended = true) AS suspended,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE delisted_on IS NOT NULL) AS has_delisted_on,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE nifty_500 = true) AS in_nifty500
FROM public.de_instrument;

SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='atlas' AND table_name='atlas_universe_stocks' ORDER BY ordinal_position;
SELECT column_name, data_type, is_nullable FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'atlas' AND table_name = 'atlas_universe_stocks' ORDER BY ordinal_position;

SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_universe_rows,
  COUNT(DISTINCT instrument_id) AS unique_iids,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE effective_to IS NULL) AS currently_active,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE effective_to IS NOT NULL) AS historical_deactivated,
  MIN(effective_from) AS earliest_from,
  MAX(effective_from) AS latest_from
FROM atlas.atlas_universe_stocks;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT instrument_id) AS ohlcv_iids FROM public.de_equity_ohlcv WHERE date >= '2026-05-01';

-- Count universe iids that have OHLCV data
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT u.instrument_id) AS universe_with_ohlcv
FROM atlas.atlas_universe_stocks u
WHERE EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM public.de_equity_ohlcv o 
  WHERE o.instrument_id = u.instrument_id
  AND o.date >= '2015-01-01'
  LIMIT 1
);

SELECT table_schema, table_name
FROM information_schema.tables
WHERE table_schema IN ('atlas','public')
  AND (table_name LIKE '%scorecard%'
       OR table_name LIKE '%etf%'
       OR table_name LIKE '%fund%'
       OR table_name LIKE '%conviction%'
       OR table_name LIKE '%cell%'
       OR table_name LIKE '%signal%'
       OR table_name LIKE '%regime%')
ORDER BY table_schema, table_name;

WHERE c.snapshot_date='2026-05-22';

WHERE s.snapshot_date='2026-05-22';

JOIN atlas.atlas_universe_funds u ON u.mstar_id = s.scheme_code AND u.effective_to IS NULL

-- How many fund_metrics rows in last 14d of snapshot?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM atlas.atlas_fund_metrics_daily WHERE nav_date BETWEEN '2026-05-08' AND '2026-05-22';

-- Check signal_unified within last 7d
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM atlas.atlas_stock_signal_unified WHERE date BETWEEN '2026-05-13' AND '2026-05-22';

-- A simpler "latest date <= snapshot" approach
SELECT MAX(date)::text FROM atlas.atlas_stock_signal_unified WHERE date <= '2026-05-22';

EXPLAIN ANALYZE
WITH latest_signal_date AS (
  SELECT MAX(date) AS d FROM atlas.atlas_stock_signal_unified WHERE date <= '2026-05-22'
)
SELECT
  u.instrument_id::text          AS iid,
  u.symbol,
  ls.rs_state,
  m.ret_1m::text                 AS ret_1m
FROM atlas.atlas_universe_stocks u
LEFT JOIN atlas.atlas_stock_signal_unified ls
  ON ls.instrument_id = u.instrument_id AND ls.date = (SELECT d FROM latest_signal_date)
LEFT JOIN atlas.atlas_stock_metrics_daily m
  ON m.instrument_id = u.instrum

EXPLAIN ANALYZE
WITH latest_nav_date AS (
  SELECT MAX(nav_date) AS d FROM atlas.atlas_fund_metrics_daily WHERE nav_date <= '2026-05-22'
)
SELECT
  s.scheme_code AS iid,
  s.composite_score::text AS composite_score,
  lm.ret_1m::text AS ret_1m
FROM atlas.atlas_fund_scorecard s
LEFT JOIN atlas.atlas_fund_metrics_daily lm
  ON lm.mstar_id = s.scheme_code AND lm.nav_date = (SELECT d FROM latest_nav_date)
WHERE s.snapshot_date = '2026-05-22'
LIMIT 5;

CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW atlas.mv_india_pulse AS
WITH
dates AS (SELECT date AS as_of_date FROM atlas.atlas_market_regime_daily),
regime_v5 AS (SELECT date, pct_above_ema_200, pct_above_ema_50, india_vix, ad_ratio, mcclellan_oscillator, new_52w_highs, new_52w_lows, ad_line, advances_count, declines_count FROM atlas.atlas_market_regime_daily),
regime_v6 AS (SELECT date, smallcap_rs_z, cross_sectional_dispersion, vix_percentile, breadth_pct_above_200dma FROM atlas.atlas_regime_daily),
macro_vix9d A

SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
  MIN(as_of_date)::text AS min_date,
  MAX(as_of_date)::text AS max_date,
  (SELECT version_num FROM atlas.atlas_alembic_version) AS alembic_head,
  (SELECT jobname FROM cron.job WHERE jobname = 'mv_india_pulse_nightly') AS cron_job,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE headline_indices IS NOT NULL) AS rows_w_headline,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE breadth_table IS NOT NULL) AS rows_w_breadth,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE sector_heatmap IS NOT NULL) AS rows_w_sectors,
  COUNT(*) FILT

SELECT
  as_of_date,
  vix_spot,
  ROUND(vix_5y_pct::numeric, 3) AS vix_5y_pct,
  (headline_indices -> 0 ->> 'label')   AS first_idx,
  (headline_indices -> 0 ->> 'close')    AS first_idx_close,
  (macro_cards -> 0 ->> 'label')         AS first_macro,
  (macro_cards -> 0 ->> 'value')         AS first_macro_value,
  jsonb_array_length(headline_indices)   AS num_indices,
  jsonb_array_length(breadth_table)      AS num_breadth_rows,
  jsonb_array_length(sector_heatmap)     AS num_sectors,
  jsonb_a

CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW IF NOT EXISTS atlas.mv_sector_breadth AS
WITH
spine AS (SELECT DISTINCT date AS as_of_date, sector_name FROM atlas.atlas_sector_metrics_daily WHERE date >= '2020-01-01'),

SELECT

  COUNT(constituents_top30) AS has_constituents,
  COUNT(top_picks_top10) AS has_top_picks,

  COUNT(strength_dist) AS has_strength_dist
FROM atlas.mv_sector_deepdive;

  sector_name,
  jsonb_typeof(constituents_top30) AS constituents_type,
  jsonb_typeof(top_picks_top10) AS top_picks_type,
  jsonb_typeof(strength_dist) AS strength_type,
  jsonb_typeof(returns) AS returns_type
FROM atlas.mv_sector_deepdive
WHERE sector_name = 'Energy';

  sector_name,

WHERE n.nspname = 'atlas'

    'atlas_universe_stocks',

),
latest_conviction_date AS (

),
latest_ohlcv_date AS (

),
universe AS (

SELECT indexname FROM pg_indexes WHERE schemaname='atlas' AND tablename='mv_stock_landscape';

SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
  COUNT(cap_tier) AS has_cap_tier,
  COUNT(composite_score) AS has_composite,
  COUNT(rs_3m_nifty500) AS has_rs3m,
  COUNT(bubble_quadrant) AS has_quadrant,
  COUNT(liquidity_proxy_cr) AS has_liquidity,
  COUNT(cell_id) AS firing_open_cells,
  COUNT(cell_ic) AS firing_with_ic,
  COUNT(composite_trajectory_30d) AS has_trajectory
FROM atlas.mv_stock_landscape;

SELECT
  date,
  COUNT(*) AS rows_today,
  COUNT(rs_3m_nifty500) AS has_rs3m,
  COUNT(rs_1m_nifty500) AS has_rs1m,
  COUNT(ret_3m) AS has_ret3m
FROM atlas.atlas_stock_metrics_daily
WHERE date >= (SELECT MAX(date) - INTERVAL '15 days' FROM atlas.atlas_stock_metrics_daily)
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT bubble_quadrant, action, COUNT(*) AS n,
  ROUND(AVG(rs_3m_nifty500)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rs3m,

GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2;

SELECT 'atlas_scorecard_daily' AS tbl, MAX(date) AS last, COUNT(*) AS rows FROM atlas.atlas_scorecard_daily
UNION ALL SELECT 'atlas_signal_calls', MAX(date), COUNT(*) FROM atlas.atlas_signal_calls
UNION ALL SELECT 'atlas_etf_scorecard', MAX(snapshot_date), COUNT(*) FROM atlas.atlas_etf_scorecard
UNION ALL SELECT 'atlas_etf_signal_calls', MAX(date), COUNT(*) FROM atlas.atlas_etf_signal_calls
ORDER BY tbl;

-- Inspect Nifty 500 index code + recent returns
SELECT index_code, MAX(date) AS last_date, COUNT(*) AS rows
FROM atlas.atlas_index_metrics_daily
WHERE index_code ILIKE '%NIFTY%500%'
GROUP BY index_code
ORDER BY index_code;

-- Backfill rs_*_nifty500 for stocks where NULL. Formula: rs_window = stock_ret - nifty500_ret
WITH n500 AS (
  SELECT date, ret_1w, ret_1m, ret_3m
  FROM atlas.atlas_index_metrics_daily
  WHERE index_code = 'NIFTY 500'
)
UPDATE atlas.atlas_stock_metrics_daily smd
SET
  rs_1w_nifty500 = COALESCE(smd.rs_1w_nifty500, smd.ret_1w - n500.ret_1w),
  rs_1m_nifty500 = COALESCE(smd.rs_1m_nifty500, smd.ret_1m - n500.ret_1m),
  rs_3m_nifty500 = COALESCE(smd.rs_3m_nifty500, smd.ret_3m - n500.ret_3m)
FROM n5

SELECT date, usdinr, dxy, vix_9d, india_10y_yield, brent_inr, cpi_yoy
FROM atlas.atlas_macro_daily WHERE date >= '2026-05-20' ORDER BY date DESC;

SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns
WHERE table_schema='atlas' AND table_name='atlas_market_regime_daily'
  AND (column_name LIKE '%smallcap%' OR column_name LIKE '%rs%' OR column_name LIKE '%dispers%')
ORDER BY column_name;

SELECT
  narrative_ribbon->'india_10y_yield' AS india_10y,
  narrative_ribbon->'real_yield' AS real_yield,
  macro_cards->4 AS card_us_10y_sample,
  (macro_cards->4)->'value' AS us10y_value,
  (macro_cards->4)->'ret_1m' AS us10y_ret_1m
FROM atlas.mv_india_pulse
WHERE as_of_date = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date) FROM atlas.mv_india_pulse)
LIMIT 1;

SELECT jsonb_path_query(macro_cards, '$[*] ? (@.id == "us_10y" || @.id == "india_10y")') AS card
FROM atlas.mv_india_pulse
WHERE as_of_date = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date) FROM atlas.mv_india_pulse)
LIMIT 5;

SELECT
  jsonb_array_length(sector_heatmap) AS heatmap_n,
  (sector_heatmap->0) AS first_sector_sample,
  jsonb_object_keys(sector_heatmap->0) AS first_keys
FROM atlas.mv_india_pulse
WHERE as_of_date = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date) FROM atlas.mv_india_pulse)
LIMIT 5;

SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns
WHERE table_schema='atlas' AND table_name='mv_etf_list_v6' AND column_name LIKE 'signal%' ORDER BY column_name;

SELECT signal_tenure, pg_typeof(signal_tenure)::text AS tenure_type, action, pg_typeof(action)::text AS action_type
FROM atlas.mv_etf_list_v6 LIMIT 1;
SELECT jobid, jobname, schedule, command FROM cron.job WHERE jobname LIKE 'mv_%' OR command LIKE '%MATERIALIZED%' ORDER BY jobid;

-- Drop redundant per-MV jobs (jobs 14-22) created during chunks 100-108
SELECT cron.unschedule(jobid)
FROM cron.job
WHERE jobname IN (
  'mv_india_pulse_nightly',
  'mv_markets_rs_detail_charts_nightly',
  'mv_sector_cards_nightly',
  'mv_sector_breadth_nightly',
  'mv_sector_rrg_nightly',
  'mv_sector_deepdive_nightly',
  'mv_stock_landscape_nightly',
  'mv_etf_list_v6_nightly',
  'mv_etf_deepdive_nightly'
);
-- Create consolidated chain at 21:45 UTC = 03:15 IST (after intel chain finishes)
SE

SELECT
  inhrelid::regclass::text AS partition,
  pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size(inhrelid)) AS size
FROM pg_inherits
WHERE inhparent = 'public.de_equity_ohlcv'::regclass
ORDER BY partition;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS partitions_with_idx
FROM pg_indexes
WHERE schemaname='public' AND indexname LIKE '%instrument_date_desc%';
EXPLAIN
SELECT close FROM public.de_equity_ohlcv
WHERE instrument_id = (SELECT instrument_id FROM atlas.atlas_universe_stocks WHERE effective_to IS NULL LIMIT 1)
  AND date < '2024-12-16'
ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT indexname, indexdef
FROM pg_indexes
WHERE schemaname='public' AND tablename='de_equity_ohlcv'
ORDER BY indexname;
